title: Captured
description: You have been hunted down and captured by one of Sin's huntresses...good luck.

title: Everyday Life
description: It's been a month since your capture. Every day your concept of normality fades, but still, you hold hope for freedom.

title: Ta Onyxilte Tervanne - The Alien Blacksite
description: A myth comes alive, a harrowing discovery of ones crazed ambitions realised, dive into the alien blacksite and realise the harrowing truths of their dark desires.
